lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਅਤੁਲੁ ਨ ਤੋਲੀਐ ਕਥਨਿ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਾਇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: saahib atul na toleeai kathan na paaeaa jaae |5|
lines.english: Our Lord and Master is Unweighable; He cannot be weighed. He cannot be found merely by talking. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਾਪਾਰੀ ਵਣਜਾਰਿਆ ਆਏ ਵਜਹੁ ਲਿਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: vaapaaree vanajaariaa aae vajahu likhaae |
lines.english: The merchants and the traders have come; their profits are pre-ordained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂੰਜੀ ਸਾਚੀ ਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਨਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਤਿਲੁ ਨ ਤਮਾਇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: poonjee saachee gur milai naa tis til na tamaae |6|
lines.english: With the Merchandise of Truth, they meet the Guru, who does not have a trace of greed. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਵਹਿ ਸਚ ਕੀ ਲਾਹਾ ਮਿਲੈ ਰਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kaar kamaaveh sach kee laahaa milai rajaae |
lines.english: Those who practice Truth reap the profits, abiding in the Will of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਤੋਲਿ ਤੋੁਲਾਇਸੀ ਸਚੁ ਤਰਾਜੀ ਤੋਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh tol toulaaeisee sach taraajee tol |
lines.english: As Gurmukh, they are weighed and measured, in the balance and the scales of Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਨਸਾ ਮੋਹਣੀ ਗੁਰਿ ਠਾਕੀ ਸਚੁ ਬੋਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa manasaa mohanee gur tthaakee sach bol |
lines.english: The enticements of hope and desire are quieted by the Guru, whose Word is True.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਤੁਲਾਏ ਤੋਲਸੀ ਪੂਰੇ ਪੂਰਾ ਤੋਲੁ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: aap tulaae tolasee poore pooraa tol |7|
lines.english: He Himself weighs with the scale; perfect is the weighing of the Perfect One. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਥਨੈ ਕਹਣਿ ਨ ਛੁਟੀਐ ਨਾ ਪੜਿ ਪੁਸਤਕ ਭਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: kathanai kehan na chhutteeai naa parr pusatak bhaar |
lines.english: No one is saved by mere talk and speech, nor by reading loads of books.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਸੋਚ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਬਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਪਿਆਰ ॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa soch na paaeeai bin har bhagat piaar |
lines.english: The body does not obtain purity without loving devotion to the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਮੇਲੇ ਗੁਰੁ ਕਰਤਾਰ ॥੮॥੯॥
lines.translit: naanak naam na veesarai mele gur karataar |8|9|
lines.english: O Nanak, never forget the Naam; the Guru shall unite us with the Creator. ||8||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਦੀਜੈ ਗੁਰ ਆਪਣੇ ਪਾਈਐ ਸਰਬ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: man deejai gur aapane paaeeai sarab piaar |
lines.english: Surrendering our minds to our Guru, we find universal love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਜੇ ਮਿਲੈ ਪਾਈਐ ਰਤਨੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: satigur pooraa je milai paaeeai ratan beechaar |
lines.english: Meeting the Perfect True Guru, we find the jewel of meditative reflection.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਕਤਿ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਅਵਗਣ ਮੇਟਣਹਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: mukat padaarath paaeeai avagan mettanahaar |1|
lines.english: We find the wealth of liberation, and our demerits are erased. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਈ ਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhaaee re gur bin giaan na hoe |
lines.english: O Siblings of Destiny, without the Guru, there is no spiritual wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਛਹੁ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੇ ਨਾਰਦੈ ਬੇਦ ਬਿਆਸੈ ਕੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: poochhahu brahame naaradai bed biaasai koe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Go and ask Brahma, Naarad and Vyaas, the writer of the Vedas. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨੁ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਧੁਨਿ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਅਕਥੁ ਕਹਾਵੈ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: giaan dhiaan dhun jaaneeai akath kahaavai soe |
lines.english: Know that from the vibration of the Word, we obtain spiritual wisdom and meditation. Through it, we speak the Unspoken.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲ ਜਵੇਹਰ ਮਾਣਕੀ ਗੁਰ ਭੰਡਾਰੈ ਸੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: laal javehar maanakee gur bhanddaarai soe |2|
lines.english: The rubies, jewels and emeralds are in the Guru's Treasury. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਫਲਿਓ ਬਿਰਖੁ ਹਰੀਆਵਲਾ ਛਾਵ ਘਣੇਰੀ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: safalio birakh hareeaavalaa chhaav ghaneree hoe |
lines.english: He is the fruit-bearing Tree, luxuriantly green with abundant shade.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਦੁਖ ਮੇਟਣੋ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਅਸੁਰ ਸੰਘਾਰੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sukhadaataa dukh mettano satigur asur sanghaar |3|
lines.english: The True Guru is the Giver of peace, the Dispeller of pain, the Destroyer of demons. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਭੰਡਾਰੈ ਪਾਈਐ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਨਾਮ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur bhanddaarai paaeeai niramal naam piaar |
lines.english: From the Guru's Treasury, we receive the Love of the Immaculate Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੋ ਵਖਰੁ ਸੰਚੀਐ ਪੂਰੈ ਕਰਮਿ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: saacho vakhar sancheeai poorai karam apaar |
lines.english: We gather in the True Merchandise, through the Perfect Grace of the Infinite.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਬੇੜੀ ਨਾ ਤੁਲਹੜਾ ਨਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਵੰਝੁ ਮਲਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: naa berree naa tulaharraa naa tis vanjh malaar |
lines.english: There is no boat, no raft, no oars and no boatman.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਵਜਲੁ ਬਿਖਮੁ ਡਰਾਵਣੋ ਨਾ ਕੰਧੀ ਨਾ ਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: bhavajal bikham ddaraavano naa kandhee naa paar |
lines.english: The terrifying world-ocean is difficult and dreadful; there is no shore on this side or the one beyond.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਭੈ ਕਾ ਬੋਹਿਥਾ ਨਦਰੀ ਪਾਰਿ ਉਤਾਰੁ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: satigur bhai kaa bohithaa nadaree paar utaar |4|
lines.english: The True Guru is the only boat on this terrifying ocean. His Glance of Grace carries us across. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕੁ ਤਿਲੁ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਲਾਗੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eik til piaaraa visarai dukh laagai sukh jaae |
lines.english: If I forget my Beloved, even for an instant, suffering overtakes me and peace departs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟੁ ਬਿਨਸੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਅਗਲੋ ਜਮੁ ਪਕੜੈ ਪਛੁਤਾਇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: ghatt binasai dukh agalo jam pakarrai pachhutaae |5|
lines.english: When the pitcher of the body bursts, there is terrible pain; those who are caught by the Minister of Death regret and repent. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹਵਾ ਜਲਉ ਜਲਾਵਣੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਜਪੈ ਰਸਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jihavaa jlau jalaavanee naam na japai rasaae |
lines.english: Let that tongue be burnt in flames, which does not chant the Naam with love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚਉ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸੇਵੀਐ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਅਕਥੋ ਕਾਥਿ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: saachau saahib seveeai guramukh akatho kaath |6|
lines.english: So serve the True Lord; become Gurmukh, and speak the Unspoken. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਧਨੁ ਬਾਦਿ ਹੈ ਭੂਲੋ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਆਥਿ ॥
lines.translit: bin naavai dhan baad hai bhoolo maarag aath |
lines.english: Without the Name, wealth is useless; deceived by wealth, they have lost their way.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੀ ਮੇਰੀ ਕਰਿ ਗਏ ਤਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਕਲਤੁ ਨ ਸਾਥਿ ॥
lines.translit: meree meree kar ge tan dhan kalat na saath |
lines.english: Crying out, "Mine! Mine!", they have departed, but their bodies, their wealth, and their wives did not go with them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ਭਵਾਈਐ ਪਇਐ ਕਿਰਤਿ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aavai jaae bhavaaeeai peiai kirat kamaae |
lines.english: Coming and going, people wander through reincarnation; they act according to their past actions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਕਿਉ ਮੇਟੀਐ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਲੇਖੁ ਰਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: poorab likhiaa kiau metteeai likhiaa lekh rajaae |
lines.english: How can one's pre-ordained destiny be erased? It is written in accordance with the Lord's Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਨ ਛੁਟੀਐ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: bin har naam na chhutteeai guramat milai milaae |7|
lines.english: Without the Name of the Lord, no one can be saved. Through the Guru's Teachings, we are united in His Union. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਕੋ ਨਹੀ ਜਿਸ ਕਾ ਜੀਉ ਪਰਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: tis bin meraa ko nahee jis kaa jeeo paraan |
lines.english: Without Him, I have no one to call my own. My soul and my breath of life belong to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮਮਤਾ ਜਲਿ ਬਲਉ ਲੋਭੁ ਜਲਉ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: haumai mamataa jal blau lobh jlau abhimaan |
lines.english: May my egotism and possessiveness be burnt to ashes, and my greed and egotistical pride consigned to the fire.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਬਦੁ ਵੀਚਾਰੀਐ ਪਾਈਐ ਗੁਣੀ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ॥੮॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: naanak sabad veechaareeai paaeeai gunee nidhaan |8|10|
lines.english: O Nanak, contemplating the Shabad, the Treasure of Excellence is obtained. ||8||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੇ ਮਨ ਐਸੀ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਕਰਿ ਜੈਸੀ ਜਲ ਕਮਲੇਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: re man aisee har siau preet kar jaisee jal kamalehi |
lines.english: O mind, love the Lord, as the lotus loves the water.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਹਰੀ ਨਾਲਿ ਪਛਾੜੀਐ ਭੀ ਵਿਗਸੈ ਅਸਨੇਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: laharee naal pachhaarreeai bhee vigasai asanehi |
lines.english: Tossed about by the waves, it still blossoms with love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲ ਮਹਿ ਜੀਅ ਉਪਾਇ ਕੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਜਲ ਮਰਣੁ ਤਿਨੇਹਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jal meh jeea upaae kai bin jal maran tinehi |1|
lines.english: In the water, the creatures are created; outside of the water they die. ||1||
